description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should use a Windows 2025 environment with a matrix strategy for 64-bit builds. It should check out the repository with submodules, set up Ninja, download and install GStreamer and its development package, install Qt 5.15.2, create a build environment, configure CMake with Ninja, build the project, and upload the resulting executable as an artifact.
